title: Reviving Dead Dry-Erase Markers
author: Scott Barolo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5y3g7yn

steps.title: Tape a string to the back...
steps.instruction: Tape a string to the back of the dry-erase marker as shown below.

steps.title: Spin the marker like a lasso...
steps.instruction: Spin the marker like a lasso above your head, about 25 times. (See the video here: https://www.facebook.com/sandy.owens.54/videos/10214113211493293/ .)

steps.title: There should now be more life in the marker
steps.instruction: There should now be more life in the marker.
